overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a lush tropical jungle environment. The character walks along a dirt path past ancient stone ruins and a colorful totem, heading toward a distant smoke column rising through the dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching ancient stone ruins in tropical clearing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the ancient stone ruins while observing the colorful totem on the left

entered.detail: large stone structure with archway entrance, covered in vines and vegetation
tall pole with blue, red, and yellow decorative elements and hanging ornaments
light-colored dirt trail winding through the jungle
lush green ferns and undergrowth lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of ancient stone ruins ahead in a tropical jungle clearing. The character walks forward on a sandy dirt path, passing lush ferns and a colorful decorated totem on the left side. The ruins feature a prominent stone archway entrance partially covered in vines.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path with distant smoke column visible ahead

events.description: ancient ruins exit view to the left, entering denser jungle vegetation
smoke column becomes visible rising through the trees in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding jungle path toward the distant smoke column

entered.detail: tall column of white-gray smoke rising vertically through the tree canopy
stack of burning logs producing the smoke column

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the ancient ruins and continues through denser jungle vegetation. The colorful totem moves from left to right and exits the frame. A prominent smoke column becomes visible ahead, rising through the trees, indicating a campfire or burning logs in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with large trees and fallen logs

events.description: passing the smoking campfire on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past the smoke source and navigating through the densely forested area

entered.detail: massive decaying tree trunks fallen across the right side of the path
boulders covered in green moss lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the source of the smoke, revealing a campfire with burning logs on the right side of the path. The environment becomes more enclosed with dense tree canopy blocking much of the sky. Large fallen logs and mossy rocks line the trail as the character continues deeper into the forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky jungle trail approaching palm tree clearing

agents.ego_description: navigating the rocky path while approaching a more open jungle area with palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible in the distance indicating a clearing or transition to beach area
large mountain peak visible through the trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking on a rockier section of the trail. The campfire is left behind as the path opens up slightly, revealing tall palm trees and a distant mountain in the background. The environment transitions from dense forest to a more open jungle area with mixed vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush tropical jungle that transitions from ancient ruins to a dense forest and finally into an open jungle vista. It begins on a sandy dirt path, passing a colorful decorated totem and a vine-covered stone archway. As the character moves past the ruins, the vegetation thickens and a column of smoke emerges through the trees, drawing the camera forward. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment where the canopy blocks the sky, passing a campfire with burning logs and mossy rocks lining the trail. Finally, the path becomes rockier and opens up, leaving the dense forest behind to reveal tall palm trees and a distant mountain under a wider sky.
